tuning: E A D G B E
content:
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
                              Natalie Merchant - Carnival
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Capo 2


[Intro]
[ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]Em[/ch]

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                                            [ch]D[/ch]
   Well, I've walked these streets, a virtual stage it seemed to me[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                                        [ch]Em[/ch]
Make-up on their faces, actors took their places next to me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                                            [ch]D[/ch]
   Well, I've walked these streets in a carnival of sights to see[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                                                [ch]Em[/ch]
All the cheap thrill seekers, the vendors and the dealers, they crowded around me[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
  Have I been blind[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]D[/ch]
Have I been lost inside myself and my own mind[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
Hypnotized, mesmerized[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]Em[/ch]
By what my eyes have seen[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                                       [ch]D[/ch]
   I've walked these streets in a spectacle of wealth and poverty[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                                      [ch]Em[/ch]
 In the diamond market the scarlet welcome carpet that they just rolled out for me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                                       [ch]D[/ch]
   And I've walked these streets in the madhouse asylum they can be[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C[/ch]                                                           [ch]Em[/ch]
where a wild eyed misfit prophet on a traffic island stopped and he raved of saving me[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
  Have I been blind[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]D[/ch]
Have I been lost inside myself and my own mind[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
Hypnotized, mesmerized[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]Em[/ch]
By what my eyes have seen[/tab]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]
  Have I been wrong[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]D[/ch]
Have I been wise to shut my eyes and play along [/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
Hypnotized, paralyzed[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]Em[/ch]
By what my eyes have found[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]C[/ch]                 [ch]D[/ch]
By what my eyes have seen[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Em[/ch]
What they've seen[/tab]

[Instrumental]
([ch]Em[/ch])  [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]Em[/ch]
 [ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]Em[/ch]

[Chorus 2/Outro]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch]                  [ch]C[/ch]
  Have I been blind, have I been lost[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]D[/ch]                 [ch]C[/ch]
Have I been wrong, have I been wise, have I been strong[/tab]

Have I been?
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                      [ch]D[/ch]
Hypnotized, mesmerized[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]C[/ch]
By what my eyes have found[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]
In that great street carnival[/tab]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch]                  [ch]C[/ch]
  Have I been blind, have I been lost[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]D[/ch]                 [ch]C[/ch]
Have I been wrong, have I been wise, have I been strong[/tab]

Have I been?
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                      [ch]D[/ch]
Hypnotized, mesmerized[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]C[/ch]
By what my eyes have found[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]
In that great street carnival[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Em[/ch]
In that carnival[/tab]
